```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _stuff__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./stuff.js");


(0,_stuff__rspack_import_0.bar)();
var f = (0,_stuff__rspack_import_0.baz)();
f();

function getClass() {
	class MyClass {}
	class UnusedInnerClass1 {}
	return MyClass;
	// removed by dead control flow
{}
}

class UnusedClass {}

console.log(getClass().name);


},
"./stuff.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  bar: () => (bar),
  baz: () => (Baz)
});
function foo() {
	console.log("outer foo");
}
function bar() {
	console.log("outer bar");
}
function bog() {
	console.log("outer bog");
}
function boo() {
	console.log("outer boo");
}

function Baz() {
	function foo() {
		console.log("inner foo");
	}
	function bar() {
		console.log("inner bar");
	}
	function bog() {
		console.log("inner bog");
	}
	function boo() {
		console.log("inner boo");
	}

	return bar(), bog;
}




},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
